confirmed_issues.description: npm run lint fails with 49 Prettier formatting errors and 9 warnings across multiple source files (analytics.tsx, progress.tsx, sniperClient.ts, __root.tsx, charts.tsx, and others). These are all whitespace/style violations — no logic errors.
confirmed_issues.root_cause: Pre-existing CRLF/Prettier drift first noted in BUG_SWEEP_REPORT_2026-05-20.md. npm dependencies were not installed in the CI environment on this run (node_modules was absent); after npm install, the lint failures are Prettier formatting drift unrelated to logic.
confirmed_issues.proposed_fix: Run eslint --fix with prettier to autoformat. Low priority — does not affect runtime behavior, auth, or signal correctness.
confirmed_issues.severity_rationale: Style errors only. No logic, auth, or data-integrity impact. Build still succeeds.

confirmed_issues.description: Vite build produces a 920 kB main bundle (index-D_QN9J3U.js) that exceeds the 500 kB chunk-size warning threshold.
confirmed_issues.root_cause: Pre-existing chunking architecture. The shared router chunk accumulates most component code. Documented in BUG_SWEEP_REPORT_2026-05-20.md.
confirmed_issues.proposed_fix: Add rollupOptions.output.manualChunks in vite.config.ts to split the router from large shared dependencies. Deferred — requires dedicated bundle architecture pass.
confirmed_issues.severity_rationale: Build succeeds and app is functional. Warning only. No auth, signal, or data-integrity impact.

confirmed_issues.description: The canonical REST contract documents a `candles` array field that can contain multiple candle objects. The PHP handler compat layer (post_ea_market_stream line ~2091) only promotes candles[0] to the `candle` field for M1 processing. Any additional array entries are silently dropped.
confirmed_issues.root_cause: By design for current Phase 0/1 streaming: the EA sends M1 as a `candle` object and M15 as `candle_m15`. The `candles` array compat layer exists only to support the canonical REST contract format. Multiple-candle batch ingestion is not in scope until Phase 3.
confirmed_issues.proposed_fix: None required for current phase. Add a warning log if candles.length > 1 to surface unexpected multi-candle batches. Document as Phase 3 scope.
confirmed_issues.severity_rationale: Documented design choice. No data loss for current EA usage pattern.

migration_blockers.description: Active-day business rule sign-off required before enabling non-zero streak calculations in /user/progress endpoint. Current behavior: streak state is intentionally UNAVAILABLE until ACTIVE_DAY_DEFINITION constant is resolved from 'UNRESOLVED_REQUIRES_SIGNOFF'.
Final browser parity review recommended for Phase 2 trade telemetry panels (account card, live positions, floating P/L, hedge grouping, sync health) before production deploy.

systems_confirmed_clean.notes: X-EA-API-Key read from 4 header aliases; hash_equals used; missing token → 401; unconfigured → 503; invalid → 403; missing user_id → 400; invalid user_id → 403; wp_set_current_user called. All correct.

symbol required; bid/ask validated finite+positive+bid<=ask; quote_time/timestamp compat layer; stale >300s rejected (422); 120-300s logged; candle epoch guard (>2000-01-01); OHLC validate_ohlc(); tick_volume guard_tick_volume() clamps to non-negative int; future-candle rejection.

get_cached_price() computes age_sec from updated_at (broker timestamp stored in DB), not from fetch time. iso_age_sec() is used. price_state transitions to 'stale' if age_sec > staleThresholdSec. Backend is authoritative.
Reads state from backend price object. Does not compute freshness locally. Has guard for unknown states (falls back to stale style). Does not fake live status.
Reads verdict from backend signal data. Does not derive verdict locally.
Uses permission_user (WP session required). Returns 401 for unauthenticated requests. Correct by design.
All /admin/* routes use permission_admin (manage_options required). Returns 401/403 for non-admin. Correct.
Signal engine reads price_age from age_sec, checks price_state === 'live', and requires candle_age_sec <= 7200. Does not run on stale data.
All queries gated on backendReady && pollMs !== null. Prevents orphaned queries during initialization. No duplicate refresh loops.
Optimistic updates with rollback on error. Invalidates related queries after success. Backend is authoritative for watchlist.
